news.title: Core Scientific Inc (NASDAQ:CORZ) Reports Q4 2025 Earnings Miss Amid Strategic Pivot
news.summary: Core Scientific's Q4 2025 earnings missed estimates as its pivot from Bitcoin mining to AI colocation incurs high costs, despite revenue growth in the new segment.
